# ADR 000 — Template (copy, do not edit in place)

> Copy this file to `NNN-short-title.md` (numbered in creation order, starting at 001) and fill in the sections below. Leave this template at `000-template.md` so the next agent sees the shape.

**Status:** {proposed | accepted | superseded by ADR-XXX} · YYYY-MM-DD

## Context
What problem prompted this decision? What constraints apply? Reference relevant code paths, prior ADRs, or session logs.

## Decision
The decision itself, in one paragraph or a short bullet list.

## Rationale
Why this and not the alternatives considered. Be specific enough that a future reader can tell whether the rationale still holds.

## Consequences
- **Positive** — what this enables.
- **Negative** — what this costs or complicates.

## Status history
- YYYY-MM-DD — Proposed.
- YYYY-MM-DD — Accepted.
- YYYY-MM-DD — Superseded by ADR-XXX. (if applicable)
